personalInfo.name: Pravin Amalan
personalInfo.title: Frontend Developer | React.js · Laravel · PHP · MySQL
personalInfo.bio: I build responsive, production-ready web applications with strong UI quality, clean architecture, and reliable performance. My focus is creating products that are easy to use, easy to maintain, and aligned with business goals.

quickFacts.label: Education
quickFacts.value: M.Sc. Data Analytics and B.Sc. Mathematics

quickFacts.label: Work Preference
quickFacts.value: Open to full-time opportunities · Tirunelveli and Remote

quickFacts.label: Core Strength
quickFacts.value: Frontend architecture, API integration, and delivery ownership

expertise.title: Frontend Development
expertise.description: Designing and building responsive interfaces with React.js, Vue.js, semantic HTML, and scalable CSS systems for production applications.

expertise.title: Backend Development
expertise.description: Developing secure Laravel APIs and data-driven features with MySQL-backed architecture.

expertise.title: MERN Stack Development
expertise.description: Building full-stack applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js with real-time capabilities via Socket.IO.

expertise.title: Legacy Code Migration
expertise.description: Modernizing legacy PHP products into maintainable Laravel codebases with improved performance and delivery speed.

expertise.title: Dashboard and CRM Development
expertise.description: Building business dashboards and CRM workflows with clear UX, role-based flows, and clean data presentation.

expertise.title: Performance Optimization
expertise.description: Improving load time, rendering performance, and runtime efficiency across frontend and backend layers.

experience.description: Work across product teams to build and maintain web applications in healthcare, education, CRM, and apartment management domains. Responsibilities include feature implementation, API integration, UI optimization, and cross-team delivery collaboration.
achievements: Built reusable UI components that improved development velocity across multiple projects.
Delivered frontend and backend features for CRM and management platforms using React.js and Laravel.

Stepped up as sole frontend developer on LDG education platform for 7+ months covering a team vacancy — collaborating directly with backend developers on REST API integration and completing pending tickets.
Owned final-phase development, testing, and release coordination for DJ CRM from architecture to deployment.
Reduced Storage Master page load times by 50% through Laravel migration and query optimization.

experience.description: Completed a structured 6-month full-stack training program, progressing through each technology with task-based assessments before advancing to the next module.
achievements: Trained sequentially across HTML5 and CSS3 → Sass → Bootstrap → JavaScript → Laravel → MySQL.
Delivered individual project tasks at the end of each module demonstrating hands-on competency.
Promoted to Frontend Developer within 6 months based on consistent performance and task completion quality.

projects.title: APARTEASE
projects.subtitle: Multi-Role Apartment and Community Management Platform
projects.description: Built a full-stack apartment management platform using the MERN stack with dedicated portals for residents, admins, staff, vendors, and super admins. Implemented billing and Razorpay payments, complaint and service workflows, gate-pass security logs, attendance management, multilingual UI, and real-time community chat via Socket.IO.

projects.title: INFLOWCARE
projects.subtitle: Homecare Agency Management Platform
projects.description: Delivered core UI modules for patient intake, caregiver onboarding, and scheduling operations. Built dynamic forms, reusable components, and admin-facing dashboards for day-to-day business workflows. Integrated frontend components with Laravel APIs and MySQL for real-time data management.

projects.title: LDG
projects.subtitle: Language Dynamics Groups — Education Assessment Platform
projects.description: Took complete frontend ownership for 7+ months while covering a team vacancy. Developed and maintained responsive UI modules for student progress tracking, literacy assessment management, and result dashboards. Collaborated directly with backend developers on REST API integration and completed pending development tickets to maintain project delivery timelines.

projects.title: DJ CRM
projects.subtitle: Event Planning and Music Operations CRM
projects.description: Built and maintained features for event planning workflows, song database management, guest song requests, event calendars, and authentication-driven operations. Took complete ownership in final stages — managing frontend, backend APIs, database design, testing, and deployment.
